message:
test(proptest): add 19 property tests for connector governor coverage gaps

Cover GovernorVerdict/GovernorReason serde roundtrip and Display, queue
backpressure depth fraction bounds, peak tracking, throttle-before-reject
ordering, QueueBackpressureSnapshot serde, TokenBucketConfig/QuotaConfig/
CostBudgetConfig serde roundtrips, empty bucket refuse, full bucket zero
wait, consume_n over capacity, cost estimate determinism, CostBudget
snapshot consistency, record_outcome backoff tracking, connector_ids
tracking, and governor snapshot connector coverage. 17→36 total tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
